Khamenei, ruling since 1989, leaves no confirmed successor, raising concerns about political stability.

title: New SIM-binding rule from March 1: WhatsApp, Telegram users must know these changes
description: Starting March 1, messaging apps like WhatsApp and Telegram must implement SIM-binding, requiring services to function only with the registered SIM in the primary device.
